sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table AS SELECT structureToCapnProtoSchema('column1 String, column2 Int32, column3 Float64') ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES(structureToCapnProtoSchema('column1 Nullable(String), column2 UInt32'));
SELECT structureToCapnProtoSchema('column1 Array(String), column2 Map(String, UInt32)) FORMAT RawBLOB;
UPDATE test_table SET column1 = structureToCapnProtoSchema('column1 String, column2 Tuple(a UInt8, b UInt16)') WHERE column2 > 10;
SELECT structureToCapnProtoSchema('column1 String, column2 Int32, column3 DateTime') AS schema_output FORMAT RawBLOB;
